case_title: ANNE STEPHENSON VS. FCA US LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR APR-06-2026 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON APR-09-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MOTION IN LIMINE NO. 6 OF 10 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION IN LIMINE TO PRECLUDE ARGUMENT BY DEFENDANT THAT DEFECTS OR COMPONENTS REPAIRED AFTER A SINGLE ATTEMPT ARE NOT COUNTED UNDER THE SONG-BEVERLY ACT (TRANSACTION ID # 78954870) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON, ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL

MOTION IN LIMINE NO. 9 OF 10 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION IN LIMINE TO PROHIBIT TESTIMONY OR EVIDENCE NOT PREVIOUSLY IDENTIFIED OR CONTAINED WITHIN DEFENDANT'S FORMAL DISCOVERY RESPONSES (TRANSACTION ID # 78954870) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON, ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL

MOTION IN LIMINE NO. 10 OF 10 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION IN LIMINE TO EXCLUDE EVIDENCE RELATING TO MILEAGE ON THE SUBJECT VEHICLE FOLLOWING PLAINTIFF'S REPURCHASE REQUEST (TRANSACTION ID # 78954870) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON, ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL

MOTION IN LIMINE NO. 3 OF 10 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION IN LIMINE TO PROHIBIT TESTIMONY OR EVIDENCE REGARDING ANY CLAIM OF A DISCLAIMER OF THE IMPLIED WARRANTY OF MERCHANTABILITY (TRANSACTION ID # 78954870) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON, ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL

MOTION IN LIMINE NO. 7 OF 10 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION IN LIMINE TO EXCLUDE EVIDENCE OR ARGUMENT BY DEFENDANT AS TO LACK OF MAINTENANCE, ABUSE, OR NEGLECT (TRANSACTION ID # 78954870) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON, ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL

MOTION IN LIMINE NO. 8 OF 10 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION IN LIMINE TO PROHIBIT ARGUMENTS REGARDING DEFENDANT'S ABILITY TO REPAIR VEHICLE (TRANSACTION ID # 78954870) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON, ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 75934036) DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON, ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL

MOTION IN LIMINE NO. 4 OF 10 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION IN LIMINE TO PROHIBIT DEFENDANT FROM ASSERTING DEFENSES OR OFFERING TESTIMONY NOT GIVEN AT DEPOSITION (TRANSACTION ID # 78954870) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON, ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL

MOTION IN LIMINE NO. 5 OF 10 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION IN LIMINE TO PRECLUDE ARGUMENT BY DEFENDANT THAT PLAINTIFF'S CONTINUED USE OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE BARS RECOVERY OR REDUCES DAMAGES (TRANSACTION ID # 78954870) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON, ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74959816) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON, ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT FCA US LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-09-2025 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-06-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-17-2025
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75197363) FILED BY DEFENDANT FCA US LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75957004) FILED BY DEFENDANT FCA US LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 74959816) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON, ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 74959816) TO PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON, ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74989385), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON, ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL SERVED NOV-08-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FCA US LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

MOTION IN LIMINE NO. 1 OF 10 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION IN LIMINE TO EXCLUDE TESTIMONY, ARGUMENT, OR IMPLICATION THAT PLAINTIFF MADE INSUFFICIENT EFFORTS TO REQUEST FROM DEFENDANT REPURCHASE OR REPLACEMENT OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE (TRANSACTION ID # 78954870) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON, ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL

MOTION IN LIMINE NO. 2 OF 10 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION IN LIMINE TO PROHIBIT TESTIMONY OR ARGUMENT THAT DEFENDANT CONFORMED THE VEHICLE WITHIN REASONABLE NUMBER OF REPAIR ATTEMPTS BECAUSE DEFENDANT REPAIRED A PARTICULAR COMPONENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78954870) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON, ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL

REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR APR-06-2026 - CASE SETTLED PER PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AT TRIAL CALL. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON JUL-07-2026 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. JUDGE: ROCHELLE EAST; CLERK: D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
